\tzpentry{ID4351}{Torus Toroidal Kinetic Term Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID4351 introduces Torus Toroidal Kinetic Term Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} K_{\text{torus}}(\phi) ;=; \frac{\cos\phi}{,r, (R + r\cos\phi),},, \end{equation}
